Name: Windows Scheduled Task - Disable
Description: Disables a Windows Scheduled Task for both 2008 and 2012.

Parameters.Name: TaskName
Parameters.Label: Task Name
Parameters.HelpText: Name of the Windows Scheduled Task.

Parameters.Name: MaximumWaitTime
Parameters.Label: Maximum Wait Time
Parameters.HelpText: Maximum time the script must wait before aborting. Use '0' to wait indefinitely.

Parameters.Name: SucceedOnTaskNotFound
Parameters.Label: Succeed On Task Not Found
Parameters.HelpText: This setting prevents the script from throwing an error if the task is not found.
